name: Draining State
description: Tests that an active permit prevents a resource from transitioning to FREE or GRANTED when yielded, correctly entering the DRAINING state until the permit finishes execution.

steps.comment: 2. Agent P asks for permit. Since it's read-only, it auto-grants and yields a token.
Let Agent B block in queue
5. Agent A yields. Normally this would give the lease to B...
6. ...but the active Permit blocks transition, shifting it to DRAINING.
7. Permit finishes execution, freeing the lock.
8. Resource naturally promotes Agent B to GRANTED.
